sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13960" key="a)po/sxhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόσχημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n13960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">figure, copy,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινός</foreign> Sch.Stob.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.463" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.463</biblScope> </bibl> Heeren.</sense> </entryFree>
